dataFlows.transformKql: source | where type == "indicator" | extend TimeGenerated = now(), StixId = tostring(id), Name = tostring(name), Description = tostring(description), Pattern = tostring(pattern), IndicatorValue = extract(@"value\s*=\s*'([^']+)'", 1, tostring(pattern)), IndicatorTypes = strcat_array(indicator_types, ","), Labels = strcat_array(labels, ","), Confidence = toint(confidence), RiskScore = toint(x_speculus_score), Risk = tostring(x_speculus_risk), Activity = tostring(x_speculus_activity), Attribution = tostring(x_speculus_attribution), Created = todatetime(created), Modified = todatetime(modified), ValidFrom = todatetime(valid_from), FirstSeen = todatetime(x_speculus_first_seen), LastSeen = todatetime(x_speculus_last_seen), IsScanner = tobool(x_speculus_is_scanner), ScannerName = tostring(x_speculus_scanner_name), IsTorNode = tobool(x_speculus_is_tor_node), IsBlacklisted = tobool(x_speculus_is_blacklisted), IsDatacenter = tobool(x_speculus_is_datacenter), IsVpnProxy = tobool(x_speculus_vpn_proxy), CloudProvider = x_speculus_cloud_provider, ResidentialProxy = x_speculus_residential_proxy, Isp = tostring(x_speculus_identity.isp), Org = tostring(x_speculus_identity.org), Asn = tostring(x_speculus_identity.asn), ConnectionType = tostring(x_speculus_identity.connection_type), City = tostring(x_speculus_location.city), Country = tostring(x_speculus_location.country), CountryCode = tostring(x_speculus_location.country_code) | project TimeGenerated, StixId, Name, Description, Pattern, IndicatorValue, IndicatorTypes, Labels, Confidence, RiskScore, Risk, Activity, Attribution, Created, Modified, ValidFrom, FirstSeen, LastSeen, IsScanner, ScannerName, IsTorNode, IsBlacklisted, IsDatacenter, IsVpnProxy, CloudProvider, ResidentialProxy, Isp, Org, Asn, ConnectionType, City, Country, CountryCode
